lines.lyric: I’m ready to love
lines.lyric_hangul: I'm ready to love, 내게 말해 줘
lines.lyric_translation: I’m ready to love

lines.lyric_hangul: Can we stay together? Can we stay together?
lines.lyric_translation: Tell me, can we stay together / Can we stay together

parts.lyric: Naege malhae jweo Can we stay together

lines.lyric: I’m a fool of love for you
lines.lyric_hangul: I'm a fool of love for you
lines.lyric_translation: I’m a fool of love for you

lines.lyric: Nae mameul ne gyeote Forever ne gyeote Forever
lines.lyric_hangul: 내 맘을 네 곁에 forever, 네 곁에 forever
lines.lyric_translation: My heart by your side forever

lines.lyric: Neol manna nae maeumi gyesok deo jaraseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 널 만나 내 마음이 계속 더 자라서, oh
lines.lyric_translation: My feelings grew after I met you

lines.lyric: Uri sairan chinguroneun mojara nan
lines.lyric_hangul: 우리 사이란 친구로는 모자라 난 (can we?)
lines.lyric_translation: Just friends that’s not enough for me

lines.lyric_hangul: 처음 느낀 심장의 속도가 이리 빠른 줄 몰랐어
lines.lyric_translation: First time feeling my heart race / Never thought it’d beat so fast

lines.lyric_hangul: All I wanna do is run away 'cause you are my escape, babe
lines.lyric_translation: All I wanna do is run away / Cause you are my escape baby

parts.lyric: All I wanna do is run away
Cause you are my escape baby

lines.lyric: Love has no limit daedabeul weonhae Ay
lines.lyric_hangul: Love has no limit 대답을 원해, hey
lines.lyric_translation: Love has no limit, I want an answer ay

lines.lyric: I’m ready to love
lines.lyric_hangul: I'm ready to love, 내게 말해 줘
lines.lyric_translation: I’m ready to love

lines.lyric_hangul: Can we stay together? Can we stay together?
lines.lyric_translation: Tell me, can we stay together / Can we stay together

parts.lyric: Naege malhae jweo Can we stay together

lines.lyric: I’m a fool of love for you
lines.lyric_hangul: I'm a fool of love for you
lines.lyric_translation: I’m a fool of love for you

lines.lyric: Nae mameul ne gyeote Forever ne gyeote Forever
lines.lyric_hangul: 내 맘을 네 곁에 forever, 네 곁에 forever
lines.lyric_translation: My heart by your side forever

lines.lyric_hangul: 세상의 반대로 run away, 내 손을 잡아
lines.lyric_translation: Run away to the other side of the world / Take my hand

lines.lyric_hangul: 계속 run away, 이제 날 믿어
lines.lyric_translation: Still I run away / Trust me now

lines.lyric_hangul: 숨이 차오를 듯이 내 맘 가득 채울 수 있게 (그럴 수 있게)
lines.lyric_translation: To fill my heart to the top / Like you’re short of breath (let me)

parts.lyric: Sumi chaoreul deushi nae mam gadeuk

lines.lyric: You give me purpose
lines.lyric_hangul: You give me purpose
lines.lyric_translation: You give me purpose

lines.lyric_hangul: Already know, yeah, 생각에 빠질 때 짓는 표정
lines.lyric_translation: Already know yeh / That expression lost in thought

lines.lyric: Ne gibuneul puneun Secret recipe
lines.lyric_hangul: 네 기분을 푸는 secret recipe
lines.lyric_translation: My secret recipe to make you feel better

lines.lyric_hangul: 내 눈이 널 보는 순간 다 알고 있어
lines.lyric_translation: The moment my eyes saw you / Everything’s clear

lines.lyric: Amu mal haji anado
lines.lyric_hangul: 아무 말 하지 않아도 (can we?)
lines.lyric_translation: No need to say a word

lines.lyric_hangul: 처음 느낀 심장의 속도가 이리 빠른 줄 몰랐어
lines.lyric_translation: First time feeling my heart race / Never thought it’d beat so fast

lines.lyric_hangul: All I wanna do is run away 'cause you are my escape, babe
lines.lyric_translation: All I wanna do is run away / Cause you are my escape baby

parts.lyric: All I wanna do is run away
Cause you are my escape baby

lines.lyric: Neoman junbiga dweeo isseumyeon dwae Ay
lines.lyric_hangul: 너만 준비가 되어 있으면 돼, hey
lines.lyric_translation: Just need you to be ready ay
